-$1,789 today across all accounts (essentially b/e) Was live for 5 hours, and resulted in a breakeven day. Yes… that means I was on the charts for 5 hours and made $0 today. And guess what, I am totally happy! Why? Because I followed me approach. Some days will be easy, some days will require more discipline. And he realized over the years, one day is one day. Onto tomorrow. One day at a time!

I can’t stress enough how important it is to take your breakeven and losing days. New traders come in with the mindset of making a certain monetary amount, or catching a certain moving… Not knowing that the market is unique. The best traders in the world are very situationally aware. For me, past the AM open move, once we started chopping, I knew not to have any standard. My normal standard is to follow my system, and simply compound. If I have a home run day, it is always through my system allowing me to hold the position. But, my mindset is, always to compound. 1-0 mindset. Why? Because the truth is there are less days with home run moves vs compound moves. Game of probabilities. All my job is, is to follow my system.

Journaling is what keeps me tunnel vision. Reflection is important so you know what to do. You can find a a model, and a system, but what's important is staying that lane. Sometimes I see a trader put so much time in, find profitability for a small duration, then start losing again. It's because they lose themselves again. Journaling allows me to find that profitability, and keep me tunnel vision. When you don't journal, it's easy to lose yourself as a trader, and lose your system. That is why I journal. Make sure y'all journal.

# LIVE unmuting in a couple mins

A great job we did all of December is recognition of bad. Good week overall, but Thursday was a day i look back at, and feel I could have better recognition in. The first attempt short, not to hard on as conditions were not as seek and destroy. That second trade was 100% avoidable. Was to convicted in an area of draw, when price has shown no interest into delivering into any draw outside of its overnight range. 128 point range in 6 HOURS of NY trading. 6 HOURS of internal range trading, and yet still found interest. December we neglect trading this and are aware of conditions. I just did not that day. Our system told us not to trade this, yet I did. It's one day, but a day we should have and will void in the future. Good to remember that we are called "traders" but we really are decision makers and risk managers. Let's see if i can put these words into action next week : )

Don't forget what caused that December to be so consistently profitable. Being green all 4 weeks wasn't just caused from green trades, but it was also sitting out from taking RED trades. People only focus on earning, not realizing preserving is just as important to your realization.

With out system, Thursday is abreakeven day at best. Post ORM, there was not one good set up in those conditions. Realisitcally, a -1R that day would have made sense as well. Important to realize, some days your system wont provide you the ability to make money. Markets have inconsistencies. A lot think the whole point is to make money, the whole point for me is to execute my system when its there, and sit when its not. Hopefully this makes sense.

Last week, I lost -$48k trading. Did it sting? Fuck yes. Did i tilt and try and revenge trade it back? No. Trading for over 5 years now, I've experienced it. Greed, revenge trading, emotional attachment to it all. It NEVER worked doing it that way. You have to remember, trading is a marathon. One day is one day. One week is just one week. Follow your system, follow your plan, and just get better with it overtime. That's how you find true success trading. It never gets "easy", but it sure does get easier overtime, once you let it be.

Real quick. If you cannot accept taking a loss, you are setting yourself up for failure. You shouldn't be over the top on a winning trade, nor should you be rock bottom on a loser. That is trading. Law of averages. The operation we run in here is the most transparent throughout, and if you can't accept it, please remove yourself from the group. When we are green, I see chat act normal. When we are red, and it can be any amount, seems like some just cannot comprehend it and spaxx out. This community is built for like minded folks, who want to learn and earn. If you are in here purely just to copy and paste when i buy / sell, please notify me and i'll have you removed. Any more toxicity in chat, will moderate harder and start putting foot down. For new traders, if you genuinely believe you can wake up every single day, put in 1-2 hours, and be green every single session, you are setting false expectations. If you feel like a breakeven trade is a loser, you are setting false standards. If you feel like a losing trade is the end of the world, you are setting false expectations. Everyday in th market is unique. Your goal should be to find a profitable way you put risk on in the market, and that’s it. There will be days where you are taking 0 trades. There will be days where you take good trades and they fail. There will be days you take bad trades, and they win. But zoom out. If you have a proven profitable system blueprint, you know you will be profitable in the end. Z Just follow it. Green, red or breakeven.

Over the course of the last couple weeks, i've slowly fixated more on trying to make everyone happy. Started prioritizing alerts over education. Have taken more risky trades, giving different results. That's not who I really am. My love for doing discord comes from teaching others, and seeing them win. I will also start giving a combination off alerts + ideas. Alerts will include exact entry, and the ideas will not. But... if you truly educate yourself in here, you would never need my inidcation to enter being that confirmation is the same everytime! Starting tomorrow: (non negotiable) Lives go from starting at 9:45am to -> 9:30am EST 1-0 mindset. If at any point throughout a trading session, we go 1-0, we are done. More education. Learning >>> No more risky takes. If price is bad, we purely sit out. Expect more b/e days, but also expect more calculated takes. Chat: Starting tomorrow, negativity, and toxicity will not be handled. If i see folks being negative towards each other, or to trades, I will start timing out indefently. 3 strikes, strike 3, you are banned and refunded. For the last 3 years, we have had the best community in the industry. Built off a community who prioritizes on learning, and becoming their own great trader. Members evolution plan: Level 1: Intro to the discord, naviagte  and watch education to understand how lanto trades. Can use Lanto's takes as primary insight. Level 2: Once you have gotten a better understanding of the system, and have evolved better, you can now start taking your own trades w/ Lanto's bias as confirmation. From taking signals -> taking own trades + Lanto confluence Level 3: Once you have fully emerged as a trader in the community, you start taking your own trades entirely. This is the FINAL BOSS phase. Once here, and you see consistency, your investment to the community has paid off! Time to build machines. You and I both work together at getting YOU at the next step. Let's get it fam.

For the adjustment, i suggesyt you tune in on live as much as you can. ->  The  channel will have all ideas, but at times i will not mention confirmation. But... if you are on the live, you will know exactly when i enter in perfect time, as i always execute live. 👍 Will keep up posting in  In terms of the alerts, i will be using a paper account starting from 0. Will be including it from time to time. That account will only host ALERTS. Nothing else. That way we have pure data on just alerts. Not including my personal takes. With that being said, live tomorrow @ 9:30am EST!

Didn't talk about it on the review, but something i want to briefly go over is the importance of confirmation today. No only did the 9:55am EST candle confirm on the trade by closing and violating above that bearish BPR (balance price range), but we also confirmed interest above Asia highs. Whenever an area of liquidity gets taken out (in this case buysdie), we always look at the reaction for confirmation. Just like we do for the ORM (opening range move). We look at where it goes, and more improtanty, the REACTION. Can see in the retrace after the take in the high, we immediately meet back up. Not only inverting the BPR, but also closing back on highs, showing interest in creating a higher high, and targeting ATH & above. Always an important tell. For higher we look for higher lows and higher highs. For lower, we look for lower lows, and lower highs.

Good thing to referene HTF (higher time frame) is the 4hr. Qick annotation. Last night via the Asia open, we had seen a large push back to NQ all time highs. Asia took, and London saw a sweep of the high. Since the sweep, we have slowly traded into this 4HR FVG, where we have now filled near perfectly. Watch the REACTION. If we hold this gap coming into NY, and the ORM (opening range move) is bullish, can look to play pside. If we don't hold, or see the ORM violate through the 4HR fill, and invert, expect lower. HTF (4HR) -> ORM (LTF) All i looked for in finding this via HTF was the largest gap in zone, happened to be the 4HR FVG today, and happened to put our London lows off the fill. Good for bias here. Keep an eye on it.

15m look. If we happen to see the move occur before the ORM, look for the ORM to validate it further on, and then can look for continuation in the direction of it. Key spot here. Key levels below 4HR Gap Fill - Asia lows 30,291 (Hourly wick low) 30,216 (hourly external low) Levels above - 30,554 (hourly gap fill) ATH (all time highs) Psych elvels above

How to identify bad price action. One of the best ways, are looking at overnight conditions compared to NY Historically through good NY, we tend to see Asia / London, accumilate, and NY distribute. And even at times, we may see overnight price trade well, alongside NY following through. Remember, NY tends to usually be trading at 2-3x more volume then overnight price historically. Take a look at the two zones i drew up. Yellow box = Through overnight price, our range is 526 points (from high to low) Blue box - Through our NY session so far, our range is 280 points. That means NY hasn't even traded at 60% of overnights range. Therefor, it was not worth putting risk on AM. Your best case scenario through our system, is breakeven this morning. Seen a lot of great traders take losses. We did not. Let's see how PM presents.

For a session that trades 2-3x as much more hiustorically, for it to not even be at 60% of the volatility, means we don't touch 🙂 Patience Preserve vs just getting rekt. Remember folks, our job is to earn in these conditions, but its also to reserve those gains and not give it right back.
